testsuite.name: com.flashpool.data.local.dao.ProductDaoTest
testsuite.system-out: WARNING: No manifest file found at ./AndroidManifest.xml. Falling back to the Android OS resources only. To remove this warning, annotate your test class with @Config(manifest=Config.NONE). If you're using Android Gradle Plugin, add testOptions.unitTests.includeAndroidResources = true to your build.gradle
